case_title: ALEXANDER PATTERSON VS. J.S. CREATIVE LIVING LLC

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PATTERSON, ALEXANDER J.S. CREATIVE LIVING LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-11-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATTERSON, ALEXANDER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT J.S. CREATIVE LIVING LLC $1,256.97 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,306.97, THE COURT HONORED SEVERAL DEDUCTIONS TAKEN BY DEFENDANT BUT NOT OTHERS WHICH SHOULD BE RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-11-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-11-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER PATTERSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT J.S. CREATIVE LIVING LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY STEVE CONST, DIRECTOR OF OPERATIONS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,395.00 FILED BY PATTERSON, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT J.S. CREATIVE LIVING LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-11-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVEN) SERVED AUG-22-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT J.S. CREATIVE LIVING LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) STEVE CONST, DICRECTOR OF OPERATIONS. FILED BY DEFENDANT J.S. CREATIVE LIVING LLC
